'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/UKThreatLevel/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=NuC4jcJ4XWhhW4cQF.egb06JwR_T.gNS_7H.9Tve.Sw-1773235235-1.0.1.1-8x9CV6PfEhzF.qQMkKyq1hm9VsZIRjuDMdJ9fpjMK_w"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
